integrated_outputs.summary: Added fixture-only Codex-like shell primitives, recomposed the renderer into left panel, thread workspace, right inspector, tabs, right resize, focus areas, and bottom action slot, then reworked the shell toward restored Codex AppShellLayout's flex shell/main-surface/viewport/frame/right-panel/bottom-slot structure. Captured a packaged Electron screenshot for direction review.

validation.summary: Renderer and Electron TypeScript checks passed after primitive integration.
Build passed after Codex restored layout absorption; packaged smoke verified non-empty renderer and preload injection. Screenshot: artifacts/gh-169-codex-like-shell.png

codegraph_references.summary: Explored and absorbed maintainable structure from restored `app-shell/app-shell-layout.tsx`: flex shell, main surface, main content viewport/frame, right panel slot, bottom panel slot, and focus-area capture. Did not copy motion/signal runtime, VSCode bridge, vendor bundle, or Codex business semantics.
Initialized local CodeGraph and explored existing renderer fixtures and monolithic Task Thread layout before editing.

out_of_scope: Codex private runtime or business semantics

notes: Subagent not used: #169 writes one shared renderer shell and one shared Loom carrier; parallel writers would increase conflict risk.
The local .codegraph index is tool state and is not part of the PR.
Stop after #169 PR ready for user/scheduler direction confirmation before #170.
